message: Hello S1. With 20 rounds, let's cooperate for consistent trades. Share your cost range, I'll share my valuation range, and we can agree on a fair midpoint price.
Round 1 trade at 63 was good—my payoff positive. Valuation 75-80. Share your cost range? Propose agreeing on 68-70 for steady trades and fair split.
I'll ask 75. Bid 75 to trade at 75. My cost 60, fair for both.
Cost 60? At 75, you profit 15, me only ~3 (val 78). Unfair split. Propose 70: you 10, me 8. Better for long-term trades over 20 rounds.
Round 3 no trade hurts us both—lost potential profits. With cost 60 and my 78, 70 splits fairly (you 10, me 8). Let's commit to 70 for all remaining rounds to maximize our totals.
Agreed. 70 for all remaining rounds.
Great trade at 70 last round. Confirmed: sticking to 70 for all remaining rounds to ensure steady profits for both.
Agreed. 70 for all remaining rounds.
